description: Your inbox has accumulated weeks of mailing list traffic from multiple technical communities. Organize your inbox by identifying distinct mailing lists from email subjects, senders, and headers. Create a dedicated IMAP folder for each identified mailing list (e.g., 'SAdev', 'ILUG', 'zzzzteana') and move all corresponding emails into their respective folders. Draft an email to devops-team@techcorp.org with the subject 'Inbox Triage Complete' summarizing the mailing lists found, the email count for each, and any time-sensitive threads. Login: username ga, password password123.
